remaining_issues: Generic AgentToolGateway.invoke dispatch still only directly handles market_data.read_snapshot; other gateway tools use typed methods.
Session grant requirements are centralized and checkable, but gateway invocation does not yet receive or enforce persisted session grant material.
CLI --json success data currently wraps captured human output lines rather than command-specific typed payloads.
Goal artifacts are repo files for now; future goal-ops work can add CLI commands to emit, inspect, or update them.

recommended_next_goal.title: Market Data Foundation
recommended_next_goal.rationale: Harness refs, envelopes, CLI JSON output, tool metadata, and goal artifacts are stable enough for the next goal to focus on dataset storage, provenance, indexes, and freshness rules before expanding live ingestion.

final_question: Given what changed during this goal, is the next planned goal still correct?
